## Problem / motivation

What problem are you trying to solve? What's frustrating or missing today?

## Proposed idea

A clear and concise description of what you'd like to see.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've thought about.

## Additional context

Add any other context, mockups, references, or screenshots here.
